ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Continued To Dec-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Maureen McFadden, Esq., in propria persona, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update re the related Canadian matter and requests a continuance of two months to have that matter resolved and subsequently close this Estate.

The subject matter is continued to Dec-10-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Musto. Not Reported.
